overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The scene transitions from a covered industrial walkway with massive overhead pipes and red neon lighting to an open street dominated by a massive red corporate tower, then through narrow passages between futuristic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway beneath massive overhead pipe infrastructure

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway into a more open urban area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath industrial pipes, moving toward the open street ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive network of rusted industrial pipes and conduits running overhead along the entire walkway
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the dark wall to the left
orange metal safety railings separating the sidewalk from the street level
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with visible seams and stains

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered industrial walkway beneath massive overhead pipe infrastructure. Red neon strips illuminate the left wall while orange railings line the right side. The space is semi-enclosed with limited sky visibility, creating a dystopian corridor effect as the character approaches an opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza dominated by massive corporate tower

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the massive red tower against the dusk sky
transition from shaded covered area to open space with warm dusk backlighting

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the massive red tower, then continuing to walk along the street

entered.detail: towering red and black corporate skyscraper with geometric patterns and illuminated windows
large illuminated advertisement screens showing commercial content
tall smokestacks emitting smoke into the dusk sky in the background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive red corporate tower. The camera tilts up to emphasize the tower's scale against the warm dusk sky. Digital billboards line the right side while industrial smokestacks punctuate the horizon, creating a stark contrast between corporate architecture and industrial decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with digital advertising and industrial backdrop

events.description: moving into a narrower passage between the modern building wall and street structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level past digital billboards, moving between the large building and the road

entered.detail: smooth dark metallic facade of the adjacent building with horizontal panel lines
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
elevated pedestrian walkway or structure attached to the building

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the street level, passing between a modern building wall on the left and the open street on the right. Digital billboards become more prominent in the foreground while palm trees and industrial smokestacks mark the distant horizon. The space transitions from open plaza to a more defined urban street corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage opening to plaza with corporate vehicle

events.description: passing a parked Arasaka corporation vehicle on the right side of the walkway
emerging from narrow passage into a wider plaza area with more open space

agents.ego_description: walking past the parked Arasaka vehicle and continuing toward the open plaza ahead

notable_agents.action: Arasaka corporation SUV parked on the side of the walkway with red interior lighting

entered.detail: black SUV with red interior lighting and Arasaka corporation logo on the side
wider open area ahead with scattered vegetation and street furniture

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow passage between buildings, passing a parked Arasaka corporation vehicle with distinctive red lighting. The space opens up into a wider plaza area with palm trees lining the left side and industrial structures visible in the distance. The transition from enclosed passage to open plaza marks the end of the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit corporate plaza at dusk. It begins within a covered walkway beneath massive overhead pipes, where red neon strips and orange railings create a confined dystopian tunnel. As the character exits this enclosure, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the camera tilts upward to reveal a towering red corporate monolith set against a warm sky and distant smokestacks. The movement then shifts along the street level, passing between modern building walls and prominent digital billboards before narrowing into a tight passage beside a red-lit Arasaka vehicle. Finally, the space expands once more into a wide plaza lined with palm trees and industrial structures on the horizon.
